data.content: Implementation review passed. Fixed 2 issues: (1) added missing /api/settings/actions endpoint to OpenAPI spec in paths-settings.ts, (2) corrected OrchestrationEvent schema reference in paths-streaming.ts (was incorrectly referencing BreakdownEvent). Added OrchestrationEvent schema to schemas.ts. All quality gates pass: typecheck clean, 1702 tests pass. Commit 0ba150d pushed to origin/main.
